title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・自分を生きてこそ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running her own path in the coolest way she can,
Vodka comes out on top in the fierce battle and
wins the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On stage, Vodka admits she would not have been
victorious if it weren't for Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka achieves her greatest glory by walking her
own path, giving her an incomparable sense of
accomplishment.
